title: Parkio Daily for April 27, 2026
teaser: Toy Story 5 merchandise hits stores ahead of the June 19 film release. Parks operating normally today with live streams from Magic Kingdom.

rides.name: Expedition Everest
rides.note: Check out new Yak & Yeti menu items nearby

bignews.title: Toy Story 5 Merchandise Now Available
bignews.body: Disney and Pixar are launching a full line of Toy Story 5 products ahead of the film's June 19 theatrical release. New items include interactive talking figures from Mattel featuring Woody, Buzz, Jessie, and new character Lilypad, plus collectibles from Funko, LEGO sets, Crocs boots inspired by Jessie, and travel accessories from Away. The merchandise celebrates both classic characters and newcomers like Lilypad and Smarty Pants.

topstories.title: Interactive Toy Story 5 Figures Talk to Each Other
topstories.body: Mattel's new Playscale Interactables bring imaginative play to life with figures that recognize and talk to each other. The collection includes Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Lilypad, and Forky, each with their own iconic phrases. The toys embody the film's theme of toy meet tech, taking playtime to a new level.

topstories.title: LeapFrog Launches Explore & Learn Lilypad Toy
topstories.body: Kids can interact with Toy Story 5's new character through LeapFrog's Explore & Learn Lilypad device. The interactive toy lets children explore letters, numbers, and problem-solving skills while playing games, or send text messages to favorite Toy Story characters using emojis and preset messages.

topstories.title: Away Travel Collection Features Toy Story 5 Designs
topstories.body: Away is launching Toy Story 5 travel essentials including rolling luggage, backpacks, and bag charms for kids and adults. The collection features designs inspired by Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Aliens, and Lilypad. Products will be available on awaytravel.com and in select retail locations starting June 9.

icymi.title: Jessie-Inspired Crocs Boots Coming This Summer
icymi.body: Crocs is releasing Jessie boots featuring denim and cow print collar, red trim with white lacing, and four Jessie-themed Jibbitz charms. The Toy Story 5 collection by Crocs will be available on crocs.com and in select retail locations starting June 16.

icymi.title: Pandora Releasing Toy Story Sheriff Star Bracelet
icymi.body: Pandora's new Toy Story Sheriff Star Bracelet features blue and brown leather with an embossed sheriff star charm inspired by Woody. The Toy Story collection by Disney Pixar x Pandora will be available at us.pandora.net and in select retail locations beginning May 21.

spotlight.title: Plan Your Toy Story 5 Theater Trip
spotlight.body: Toy Story 5 gallops into theaters on June 19, bringing back Woody, Buzz Lightyear, and Jessie alongside exciting newcomers like Lilypad and Smarty Pants. The film explores Bonnie's imagination with a toy meet tech theme as classic toys encounter new high-tech playthings. Get ready for the adventure by checking out the new merchandise collection available now.
